summary: External-review improvement cycle addressing gndrmnn's feedback (CC-0081) by removing three implementation-specific test assertions: the `isoformat(timespec="seconds")` substring checks in both TestFernetRotateScript_EmbeddedContent and TestCredentialRotateScript_EmbeddedContent, and the `migrateIdx < patchIdx` byte-offset ordering assertion in TestCredentialRotateScript_MigrateBeforePatch. All remaining assertions still verify observable behavior (annotation key present, UTC timezone present, rotate-before-migrate order, HTTP error handling, etc.). Quality gates clean: 0 lint issues, 0 vet issues, 0 gosec issues, 0 stubs across 2 changed Go files.

tests_checklist.item: Removed assertions were implementation-specific, not behavior-level
Remaining assertions still verify the behavioral contract (annotation key, UTC timezone, rotate-before-migrate)

code_quality_checklist.item: Changes minimal and scope-bounded to reviewer comments

security_checklist.item: No security regression — changes are test-only

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
No architectural change — test brittleness reduction only

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Removal of over-specific assertions aligns with YAGNI

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early — test coverage for behavioral contract preserved

defensive_checklist.item: All external inputs validated at boundaries (no change)

issues_found.description: Test name `TestCredentialRotateScript_MigrateBeforePatch` no longer matches what the test verifies. After removing the `migrateIdx < patchIdx` assertion, the test only asserts `rotateIdx < migrateIdx` plus presence checks — it no longer verifies that migrate runs before the PATCH. A future reader scanning the test name will expect migrate-before-patch coverage that does not exist.
issues_found.fix: Rename the test to `TestCredentialRotateScript_RotateBeforeMigrate` and update its doc comment to describe only what is now asserted (rotate-before-migrate order plus presence of the PATCH heredoc).

suggested_improvements: Consider renaming TestCredentialRotateScript_MigrateBeforePatch to reflect that it now verifies rotate-before-migrate only (the MigrateBeforePatch portion was intentionally dropped per external review).
next_steps: Optionally rename the now-misnamed test function to match its reduced scope; otherwise the change set is ready to merge.
